name: Freshdesk
description: Monitor Freshdesk agents and group configuration for customer support compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Freshdesk
2. Click your avatar (top right) then Profile Settings
3. Copy your API Key from the right side
4. Enter your subdomain and API key below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Freshdesk Profile Settings (top-right avatar > Profile Settings)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Freshdesk agents and their access levels

checks.name: Contact Information
checks.description: Verifies Freshdesk groups are configured for support team organization
